## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill file has a `## Trigger` section
- [ ] Code examples are production-ready
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Follows existing naming convention (`abp-{topic}/SKILL.md`)
- [ ] Both Claude and OpenCode versions created (if new skill)
- [ ] Related ABP documentation linked
